title: Grave Bane
description:
A mod that adds cool new blocks from Minecraft Dungeons to spice up your world. This mod includes a variety of new blocks.
 <3
body:
Made for the _Czarnogrody_ SMP, this mod brings in awesome blocks from Minecraft Dungeons to make your builds pop!

![Example use of the blocks.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fabea12ea486611804980151e62edcad9fc5529d_0.webp)

![All current blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04c12e4dc26fc1b7adc0cea4acddabc7663c8f4b.png)

Included in the mod:

<details>
<summary>Included Blocks (Spoiler!)</summary>

### Stone Variants
- **Engraved Stone** – carved, fits ancient ruins and temples  
- **Chiseled Stone** – subtle detailing for interiors or altars  
- **Stone Pillar** – simple vertical support block  
- **Overgrown Stone Bricks** – cracked, mossy bricks for old dungeons

### Cobblestone Variants
- **Smooth Cobblestone** – clean version of regular cobble  
- **Polished Cobblestone** – shiny and refined, good for fancy builds  
- **Dirty Polished Cobblestone** – slightly worn, more realistic  
- **Cobblestone Tiles** – square-patterned cobble for floors and walls  
- **Dirty Cobblestone Tiles** – aged and stained version of the tiles  
- **Overgrown Cobblestone Tiles** – moss-covered tiles reclaimed by nature  
- **Cobblestone Pillar** – basic support block, works in medieval builds  
- **Dark Cobblestone Pillar** – darker variant, fits grim themes  
- **Overgrown Polished Cobblestone** – fancy cobble with moss creeping in

### Granite Variants
- **Smooth Granite** – polished surface, great for modern or clean builds  
- **Cut Granite** – evenly sliced, works well in interiors  
- **Engraved Granite** – etched with symbols, adds mystery

**All blocks can be crafted using the stonecutter only!**

*More blocks are planned for future updates.*
</details>
